caption: A man with gray hair wearing a black shirt is centered in a room with plain, light-colored walls. He is speaking, and his facial expressions shift slightly as he talks. In the upper right corner of the scene, the text "Tiger-TV" is visible. A blue graphic banner appears across the lower third of the screen, displaying the name "Basil Chapman" and the phone number "1-877-927-6648". While the banner is initially absent or partially obscured, it becomes fully visible and remains constant as the clip progresses. To the right of the man, a blue and white box is partially visible on a surface. The man remains in a static position throughout the sequence, with only his mouth and facial muscles moving as he delivers his message.
